word: H1761 - דַּחֲוָה - dachăvâh - dakh-av-aw' - Instrument of music

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּחוה

Transliteration: dachăvâh

Phonetic: dakh-av-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. diversions, musical instruments?, dancing girls, concubines, music

Origin: from the equivalent of H1760

TWOT entry: 2671

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
